summary: Planned one conservative classification per listed open PR. No GitHub mutations are executed in plan mode. Most PRs remain open for maintainer review, proof repair, draft completion, or merge-conflict/check cleanup. One PR is routed to security because the hydrated evidence directly involves credential-bearing webhook URLs. One PR is a close-superseded candidate because a newer hydrated PR covers the same BOOTSTRAP.md preservation path with passing proof.
